hero.title:
DIGITAL
SHADOW
ARCHIVE
hero.subtitle: Because your real personality is just a badly written fanfic. Let’s turn it into an epic trading card.

features.title: Secret‑Code Protected
features.description: Your card is locked tighter than a forgotten diary.

features.title: Flip‑Card 3D
features.description: Smooth 3D flips that would make your real ID jealous.

features.title: Theme Songs
features.description: Each card comes with a personal anthem – we don’t judge your taste (mostly).

features.title: GitHub‑Powered
features.description: No servers, no databases, just pure nerd energy.

steps.title: Step into the Void
steps.text: Hit Register and create your shadow. Fake name? We won’t tell.

steps.title: Receive Your Cipher
steps.text: A secret code is whispered into your ear (displayed on screen). Lose it and join the ghost dimension.

steps.title: Unlock & Collect
steps.text: Use your ID + Secret to view your card. Share with friends to see their dark secrets.

about.title: Why Do We Exist?
about.text: We believe that every human being is a glitch in the matrix, and every glitch deserves a well‑designed card. This is our rebellion against boring profile pages.

contact.title: Contact the Shadow Council
contact.text: We don’t have a contact form because pigeons are more secure. But you may attempt to reach us via telepathy, or just yell into the void.
